prompt_text: A dignified middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father, lean build, stern square face with tired kind eyes, streaks of gray hair in a neat topknot, dark teal traditional robe, subtle chest-pain gesture, restrained authority mixed with deep paternal tenderness, stands in the mid-background right before piled betrothal gifts; Gao Lingning, a tall elegant young Chinese noblewoman in historical hanfu, pale skin, sharp almond eyes, straight dark brows, black hair in a neat low bun with jade hairpin, cold restrained expression, faint scar on her neck, slim but resilient figure, muted white and dark teal silk robes, aristocratic yet wounded aura, appears only as a faint figure near the back doorway. Wide shot with strong hall depth: in the left foreground and midground, stacked red silk, betrothal chests, and gift boxes rise like a small hill and occupy about one third of the frame, pressing into the composition. The father faces the gifts with a slightly bent back, not joy but burden in his stance. The half-open doors and windows farther back let in slanting daylight, leaving a cold empty patch on the floor. The atmosphere emphasizes the weight of a settled marriage rather than celebration. prompt_text: A dignified middle-aged ancient Chinese scholar-official father, lean build, stern square face with tired kind eyes, streaks of gray hair in a neat topknot, dark teal traditional robe, subtle chest-pain gesture, restrained authority mixed with deep paternal tenderness, shown in a medium shot from Gao Lingning's limited point of view. He stands on the right side of the frame, turned two-thirds away from camera, facing slightly toward the stacked betrothal gifts on the left. The corners and edges of the gift boxes form diagonal pressure lines toward his body. Slanting daylight from the doorway and window outlines the frost-white strands in his hair and the line of his shoulders, while only part of his side face is visible, brows tightly locked with worry and hesitation rather than joy. The hall remains austere with dark wood and controlled color, the marriage gifts feeling heavy instead of festive.
